title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0618
summary: Respondent No.2, a Scheduled Caste woman, filed an FIR against her husband (Appellant No.1) and in-laws under IPC and SC/ST Act provisions, alleging caste-based abuse, dowry harassment, and physical and mental torture following their marriage in 2019. The FIR followed earlier DV proceedings and a...
